name: Query Datasource
description: Runs a small, bounded query against a known datasource LUID provided by EVAL_DATASOURCE_LUID.
prompt: Use the Tableau MCP server to query datasource LUID {{env.EVAL_DATASOURCE_LUID}}. First inspect or use known metadata if needed, then run this query exactly: {{env.EVAL_DATASOURCE_QUERY}}. Keep the row limit small and summarize the returned rows.
